mxfile.agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

mxCell.value:
Deuteranopia -> difficulty distinguishing reds and greens

Protanopia -> difficulty distinguishing blue-green, purple-red, yellow-pink

classTimes can be pulled from the Concordia Open Data API.

Room info cannot, as the API no longer provides location info for ongoing/future courses.
duration should represent time in hours preferably

e.g. roomCode: MB S2.255
/floorCode: S2
/buildingCode: MB
Locations are selectable for start/end points in a route (when looking for directions)
selectedCalendar is essentially the reference to the User's selected Google Calendar
